title: crotalaria pohliana var. balansae
intro: Crotalaria pohliana var. balansae is a plant species known as a flowering legume, part of the genus Crotalaria and native to certain regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria pohliana var. balansae include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, powder, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, although modern applications and dosages may vary.
